resources_provided.name: U-M GPT
resources_provided.description: Access to popular large language models with screen-reader accessibility.

resources_provided.name: U-M Maizey
resources_provided.description: Tool to query custom user datasets connected via platforms like Google and Canvas.

resources_provided.name: U-M GPT Toolkit
resources_provided.description: Platform to construct, train, and host AI models securely.

resources_provided.name: Google Gemini
resources_provided.description: Generative AI chat and image generation app available for creating content, brainstorming ideas, and assisting with research.

resources_provided.name: Google NotebookLM
resources_provided.description: AI-powered research and note-taking assistant that allows users to upload documents and interact with them through summaries, flashcards, and audio overviews.

resources_provided.name: Go Blue
resources_provided.description: A mobile AI assistant for iOS and Android that helps navigate campus life. Features include voice-based input, image analysis, and access to class information, dining menus, campus events, and student organizations.

tools.name: OpenAI API Credits
tools.description: Prepaid access to OpenAI's advanced AI models, enabling users to build and explore AI applications across various fields.

tools.name: High-Performance Computing Resources
tools.description: Funding and resources provided to purchase computing power for conducting complex artificial intelligence research.

tools.name: Research Grants
tools.description: Financial contributions awarded to faculty to advance AI-related scholarship and joint research projects.

resources_provided.name: Google Career Certificates
resources_provided.description: Training programs providing job-ready skills in fields such as cybersecurity, data analytics, digital marketing, UX design, and project management.

resources_provided.name: Google AI and Prompting Essentials Courses
resources_provided.description: Educational courses designed to teach foundational AI skills, best practices, and responsible use of AI tools.

resources_provided.name: Google Gemini
resources_provided.description: A generative AI chatbot available to the entire university community for creating content, streamlining tasks, and assisting with communications without using data for model training.

resources_provided.name: Google Gemini Pro
resources_provided.description: A paid-tier version of the assistant available by request to faculty and staff, offering additional functionality and capacity.

resources_provided.name: Google Workspace Studio
resources_provided.description: An integration tool enabling users to automate tasks between Google apps, connecting directly with Gemini for research, analysis, and content generation.

resources_provided.name: NYU Private GenAI Service (Pilot)
resources_provided.description: A private generative AI model governed by the university data privacy policy, available via approval for research projects that cannot be achieved using standard tools like Gemini.

resources_provided.name: Pythia LLM Gateway
resources_provided.description: A generative AI platform for research workflows providing access to externally hosted LLMs, including OpenAI's o4-mini and Anthropic's Claude models.

resources_provided.name: HPC Resources for Fine-Tuning
resources_provided.description: High-performance computing resources dedicated to fine-tuning large language models for research purposes.

university: New York University (Stern School of Business)

resources_provided.name: Microsoft 365 Copilot
resources_provided.description: AI agent capabilities provided to 30 MBA students as part of a semester-long research collaboration to study how AI functions as a startup co-founder.

resources_provided.name: ChatGPT Enterprise
resources_provided.description: Enterprise-grade access to ChatGPT deployed across the campus to support personalized learning, tutoring, writing support, immersive simulations, and academic advising.

resources_provided.name: ChatGPT Edu (with GPT-5)
resources_provided.description: Expanded campus-wide access to ChatGPT Edu powered by GPT-5 to advance student success, accelerate research, and transform collaboration. Includes enterprise data privacy where inputs are not used to train models.

ai_company: Vendor-independent (Integrates models from Google, OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta, etc.)

resources_provided.name: CreateAI Builder
resources_provided.description: A tool tailored for faculty and staff to build, manage, and deploy custom AI projects and agents in a secure environment, with integrations like Canvas.

resources_provided.name: CreateAI Chat
resources_provided.description: A general AI chat interface available to the entire ASU community, allowing users to interact with various large language models and upload media.

resources_provided.name: CreateAI Compare
resources_provided.description: A tool available to everyone that allows users to compare responses across different AI models simultaneously.

resources_provided.name: CreateAI Platform
resources_provided.description: A secure, model and cloud-independent environment serving as the tactical layer for developers to innovate with best-in-class technology.

ai_company: OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, Cohere, AWS, Microsoft Azure

resources_provided.name: OpenAI API (Enterprise Research License)
resources_provided.description: Direct API access to OpenAI models provided under ASU's enterprise license specifically for academic research projects.

resources_provided.name: CreateAI APIs
resources_provided.description: An enterprise-grade API gateway providing access to over 50 foundational models (including OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, and Cohere) for university-supported development teams.

resources_provided.name: AWS Bedrock and Azure OpenAI Access
resources_provided.description: Supported procurement pathways allowing individual developers and units to purchase direct API access through platforms like AWS Bedrock and Microsoft Azure for exploratory prototyping.

university: The University of Texas at Austin

resources_provided.name: UT Spark
resources_provided.description: An all-in-one generative AI platform built on secure Azure infrastructure. It offers access to advanced OpenAI models like GPT-4.1 and GPT-4o for brainstorming, summarizing research, and chatting with official UT bots, while keeping data private and protected.

university: The University of Texas at Austin

resources_provided.name: Microsoft 365 Copilot
resources_provided.description: An AI-powered assistant embedded within apps like Word, Excel, Teams, and Outlook designed to enhance productivity, simplify tasks, streamline workflows, and provide actionable insights.

university: The University of Texas at Austin

resources_provided.name: UT Sage
resources_provided.description: A virtual instructional designer and AI Tutor platform that allows instructors to create Socratic tutor chatbots to enhance student engagement and customize learning experiences based on uploaded course materials like syllabi.

university: The University of Texas at Austin

resources_provided.name: MITRE-Good Systems Partnership
resources_provided.description: A $1 million investment from the MITRE Corporation to scale up research within the Good Systems grand challenge. The partnership focuses on building capacity in six core areas: smart hand tools for work, curbing disinformation, smarter cities, ethical public camera AI, advancing racial equity, and human-robot interaction.

university: The University of Texas at Austin

resources_provided.name: Google Gemini
resources_provided.description: A generative AI chatbot formerly known as Bard, provided with enterprise-grade data protections. It is used for content generation, summarization, and interactive assistance within the secure university environment.

resources_provided.name: Google NotebookLM
resources_provided.description: An AI-powered research and note-taking tool designed to help users synthesize information from multiple uploaded documents through summaries and interactive Q&A.

resources_provided.name: AI API Gateway
resources_provided.description: A service providing direct API access to the large language models available in the Stanford AI Playground, allowing you to build custom chatbots, data analytics tools, and automated content solutions.

resources_provided.name: Stanford AI Playground
resources_provided.description: A Stanford-managed platform built on open-source technology that provides access to various large language models for secure learning and experimentation.

university: University of Tartu, Stanford University (SCALE Initiative)

resources_provided.name: Learning Outcomes Measurement Suite
resources_provided.description: A framework developed to support the longitudinal measurement of AI's influence on learner progress, tracking cognitive outcomes, model behavior, and learner response across various contexts.

resources_provided.name: Learning Lab
resources_provided.description: A research ecosystem involving partners like Arizona State University, MIT Media Lab, and UCL Knowledge Lab to advance the study of AI in learning environments.

resources_provided.name: ChatGPT Study Mode
resources_provided.description: A pedagogically aligned interaction style featuring custom system instructions designed to support deeper understanding and skill-building rather than just providing answers.
